message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceStyle arrowStyle blockStyle
skinparam actorStyle rectangle

actor Node
actor RF
actor Link
actor Hub
actor testdomain.com

sequenceDiagram
    participant Node
    participant RF
    participant Link
    participant Hub
    participant testdomain.com

    Note over RF, Link: BROADCAST: 256LW,R,F,KI7EST-0
    Note over RF: Repeated every 5 minutes while link is idle

    Note over RF: ...

    Note over Node, RF: CONTROL: Request Link KI7EST-1,KI7EST-0
    Note over RF: ...

    Note over Node, RF: CONTROL: Grant Link KI7EST-0,KI7EST-1

    Note over Node, RF: First frame has Start Flag set

    Note over Node, RF: Repeat until all data frames are sent.
    Note over Node, RF: Note that last frame has end flag set
    Note over Node, RF: If Link as response for command/packet then
    Note over Node, RF: Response Flag will be set and second data transfer happens in reverse.

    Note over Node, RF: DATA: 0x0001 256B,4F,S,_E <FEC> <payload> <FEC>
    Note over RF: DATA: 0x0001 256B,4F,S,_E <FEC> <payload> <FEC>
    Note over RF: ACK: 0x0001 0x0000, _N, _R, 0C, <FEC>

    Note over Node, RF: DATA: 0x0020 256B,4F,S,_E <FEC> <payload> <FEC>
    Note over RF: DATA: 0x0020 256B,4F,S,_E <FEC> <payload> <FEC>
    Note over RF: ACK: 0x0001 0x0000, _N, R, 0C, <FEC>

    Note over Node, RF: Final packet, assembled sequence
    Note over RF: <sig> 0001 REST KI7EST@rfnethub.net
    Note over RF: POST testdomain.com/ping
    Note over RF: /user/KI7EST/keys
    Note over RF: "MTIzNDU2NzgxEjM0NTY3ODEyMzQ1Njc4MTIzNDU2Nzg="
    Note over RF: Verify signature
    Note over RF: /ping
    Note over testdomain.com: 200

    Note over Node, RF: ACK: 0x0001 0x0000, _N, R, 0C, <FEC>
    Note over RF: DATA: 0x0001 256B,4F,S,_E
    Note over RF: KI7EST@rfnethub.net 0001 REST 200
    Note over Node, RF: ACK: 0x0001 0x0000, _N, R,0C <FEC>
    Note over RF: ACK: 0x0001 0x0000, _N, R,0C <FEC>
    Note over Node, RF: CONTROL: Close Link KI7EST-1,KI7EST-0
    Note over RF: CONTROL: Close Link KI7EST-1,KI7EST-0
    Note over Node, RF: CONTROL: Closed Link KI7EST-0,KI7EST-1

    Note over Node, RF: BROADCAST: 256LW,R,F,KI7EST-0
    Note over RF: Repeated every 5 minutes while link is idle
    Note over RF: ...
    Note over Node, RF: CONTROL: Request Link KI7EST-1,KI7EST-0
    Note over RF: ...
    Note over Node, RF: CONTROL: Grant Link KI7EST-0,KI7EST-1
    Note over Node, RF: First frame has Start Flag set
    Note over Node, RF: Repeat until all data frames are sent.
    Note over Node, RF: Note that last frame has end flag set
    Note over Node, RF: If Link as response for command/packet then
    Note over Node, RF: Response Flag will be set and second data transfer happens in reverse.

    Note over RF: ACK: 0x0001 0x0000, _N, _R, 0C, <FEC>
    Note over Node, RF: DATA: 0x0020 256B,4F,S,_E <FEC> <payload> <FEC>
